person.wealth_source: Henry Samueli co-founded Broadcom Corporation in 1991 as a fabless semiconductor company; his net worth is primarily concentrated in Broadcom stock and related holdings from the company's growth and subsequent acquisitions.

net_worth.range_note: Forbes RTB seed; range is ±15% to acknowledge stock-price volatility.
net_worth.liquidity_notes: Samueli holds significant Broadcom stock (concentrated position) but has diversified somewhat through real estate and other investments; estimated 45% liquid given public equity holdings offset by large illiquid stock concentration.

rollup.tier_reasoning: Samueli operates through a traditional foundation (Henry Samueli Foundation) but observable giving figures are not yet available in the pipeline, making a tier judgment premature. With ~$3.6B in liquid wealth and two decades as a billionaire, the gap between expected and observed cannot be calculated; the foundation's grant history and payout rate will determine whether he tracks toward the 5%-of-liquid norm or falls short. Pending verified 990-PF data.
rollup.expected_5pct_tenure_method: 5% × net_worth_best × liquidity_pct × years_as_billionaire (uncapped tenure); computed by aggregate_v3.py
